# MetalKit Functions

**API Collection**

The MetalKit framework defines helper functions that are used to efficiently interface with the Metal and Model I/O frameworks.

## Functions

- **MTKMetalVertexDescriptorFromModelIOWithError(_:)**
- **MTKModelIOVertexDescriptorFromMetalWithError(_:)**
title: MetalKit Functions
